input.heading: Credits against tax
input.text_preview: (a) Contributions to State unemployment funds (1) The taxpayer may, to the extent provided in this subsection and subsection (c), credit against the tax imposed by section 3301 the amount of contributions paid by him into an unemployment fund maintained during the taxable year under the unemployment compensation law of a State which is certified as provided in section 3304 for the 12-month period ending on October 31 of such year. (2) The credit shall be permitted against the tax for the taxable...

output.raw_response:
```json
{
  "description": "State unemployment fund contribution credit timing and certification period constraints",
  "declarations": [
    "taxable_year_start: date",
    "taxable_year_end: date",
    "certification_period_end: date",
    "certification_period_start: date",
    "contribution_payment_date: date",
    "return_filing_deadline: date",
    "paid_on_time: bool",
    "correction_case: bool",
    "erroneous_payment_date: date",
    "deemed_payment_date: date",
    "entitled_to_cease_paying: bool",
    "return_filed_date: date",
    "is_trustee_without_fault: bool",
    "year_val: int"
  ],
  "constraints": [
    "taxable_year_end >= taxable_year_start",
    "taxable_year_end <= taxable_year_start + Period(1, 0, 0)",
    "year_val == taxable_year_end.year",
    "certification_period_end == Date(year_val, 10, 31)",
    "certification_period_start == certification_period_end - Period(1, 0, 0) + Period(0, 0, 1)",
    "(correction_case == False) -> (deemed_payment_date == contribution_payment_date)",
    "(correction_case == True && entitled_to_cease_paying == False) -> (deemed_payment_date == erroneous_payment_date)",
    "(correction_case == True && entitled_to_cease_paying == True) -> (deemed_payment_date == return_filed_date)",
    "(paid_on_time == True) -> (deemed_payment_date <= return_filing_deadline)",
    "(paid_on_time == False) -> (deemed_payment_date > return_filing_deadline)"
  ]
}
```

input.heading: Method of collecting tax
input.text_preview: (d) Time for collecting tax on distilled spirits, wines, and beer (1) In general Except as otherwise provided in this subsection, in the case of distilled spirits, wines, and beer to which this part applies (other than subsection (b) of this section) which are withdrawn under bond for deferred payment of tax, the last day for payment of such tax shall be the 14th day after the last day of the semimonthly period during which the withdrawal occurs. (2) Imported articles In the case of distilled sp...

output.raw_response:
```json
{
  "description": "Tax payment deadlines with 14-day offsets from period ends, special September rules, and weekend/holiday adjustments",
  "declarations": [
    "triggering_event_date: date",
    "semimonthly_period_end: date",
    "standard_payment_due: date",
    "quarter_end: date",
    "quarterly_payment_due: date",
    "year_end: date",
    "annual_payment_due: date",
    "september_period_start: date",
    "september_period_end: date",
    "september_payment_due: date",
    "sept_year: int",
    "september_safe_harbor_start: date",
    "september_safe_harbor_end: date",
    "non_eft_september_period_end: date",
    "non_eft_september_due: date",
    "original_due_date: date",
    "adjusted_due_date: date"
  ],
  "constraints": [
    "standard_payment_due == semimonthly_period_end + Period(0, 0, 14)",
    "triggering_event_date <= semimonthly_period_end",
    "quarterly_payment_due == quarter_end + Period(0, 0, 14)",
    "(quarter_end.month == 3 && quarter_end.day == 31) || (quarter_end.month == 6 && quarter_end.day == 30) || (quarter_end.month == 9 && quarter_end.day == 30) || (quarter_end.month == 12 && quarter_end.day == 31)",
    "annual_payment_due == year_end + Period(0, 0, 14)",
    "year_end.month == 12 && year_end.day == 31",
    "september_period_start == Date(sept_year, 9, 16)",
    "september_period_end == Date(sept_year, 9, 26)",
    "september_payment_due == Date(sept_year, 9, 29)",
    "september_safe_harbor_start == Date(sept_year, 9, 1)",
    "september_safe_harbor_end == Date(sept_year, 9, 15)",
    "non_eft_september_period_end == Date(sept_year, 9, 25)",
    "non_eft_september_due == Date(sept_year, 9, 28)",
    "adjusted_due_date <= original_due_date"
  ]
}
```

input.heading: Retirement for special trial judges
input.text_preview: (d) Retired pay (1) In general Any individual who retires pursuant to subsection (a) and elects under subsection (e) to receive retired pay under this subsection shall receive retired pay during any period of retirement from service as a special trial judge at a rate which bears the same ratio to the rate of the salary payable to a special trial judge during such period as— (A) the number of years such individual has served as special trial judge bears to, (B) 15, except that the rate of such re...

output.raw_response:
```json
{
  "description": "Retired pay accrual start date and service duration thresholds",
  "declarations": [
    "retired_pay_start_date: date",
    "salary_cease_date: date",
    "service_start_date: date",
    "retirement_date: date",
    "has_ten_years_service: bool",
    "fractional_months: int"
  ],
  "constraints": [
    "retired_pay_start_date == salary_cease_date + Period(0, 0, 1)",
    "retirement_date >= service_start_date",
    "salary_cease_date >= retirement_date",
    "(has_ten_years_service == True) -> (retirement_date >= service_start_date + Period(10, 0, 0))",
    "(has_ten_years_service == False) -> (retirement_date < service_start_date + Period(10, 0, 0))",
    "fractional_months >= 0 && fractional_months < 12"
  ]
}
```

input.heading: Loss from wash sales of stock or securities
input.text_preview: (a) Disallowance of loss deduction In the case of any loss claimed to have been sustained from any sale or other disposition of shares of stock or securities where it appears that, within a period beginning 30 days before the date of such sale or disposition and ending 30 days after such date, the taxpayer has acquired (by purchase or by an exchange on which the entire amount of gain or loss was recognized by law), or has entered into a contract or option so to acquire, substantially identical s...

input.heading: Clean electricity investment credit
input.text_preview: (a) Investment credit for qualified property (1) In general For purposes of section 46, the clean electricity investment credit for any taxable year is an amount equal to the applicable percentage of the qualified investment for such taxable year with respect to— (A) any qualified facility, and (B) any energy storage technology. (2) Applicable percentage (A) Qualified facilities Subject to paragraph (3)— (i) Base rate In the case of any qualified facility which is not described in subclause (I) ...

output.raw_response:
```json
{
  "description": "Clean electricity investment credit temporal constraints including 60-day guidance rule and domestic content construction date tiers",
  "declarations": [
    "construction_begin_date: date",
    "guidance_publish_date: date",
    "qualifies_for_60day_rule: bool",
    "domestic_content_tier_1: bool",
    "domestic_content_tier_2: bool",
    "domestic_content_tier_3: bool",
    "domestic_content_tier_4: bool"
  ],
  "constraints": [
    "(qualifies_for_60day_rule == True) -> (construction_begin_date < guidance_publish_date + Period(0, 0, 60))",
    "(domestic_content_tier_1 == True) -> (construction_begin_date < Date(2025, 6, 16))",
    "(domestic_content_tier_2 == True) -> ((construction_begin_date >= Date(2025, 6, 16)) && (construction_begin_date < Date(2026, 1, 1)))",
    "(domestic_content_tier_3 == True) -> ((construction_begin_date >= Date(2026, 1, 1)) && (construction_begin_date <= Date(2026, 12, 31)))",
    "(domestic_content_tier_4 == True) -> (construction_begin_date > Date(2026, 12, 31))",
    "(domestic_content_tier_1 == True) || (domestic_content_tier_2 == True) || (domestic_content_tier_3 == True) || (domestic_content_tier_4 == True)",
    "(domestic_content_tier_1 == True) -> ((domestic_content_tier_2 == False) && (domestic_content_tier_3 == False) && (domestic_content_tier_4 == False))",
    "(domestic_content_tier_2 == True) -> ((domestic_content_tier_1 == False) && (domestic_content_tier_3 == False) && (domestic_content_tier_4 == False))",
    "(domestic_content_tier_3 == True) -> ((domestic_content_tier_1 == False) && (domestic_content_tier_2 == False) && (domestic_content_tier_4 == False))",
    "(domestic_content_tier_4 == True) -> ((domestic_content_tier_1 == False) && (domestic_content_tier_2 == False) && (domestic_content_tier_3 == False))"
  ]
}
```

input.heading: Election; revocation; termination
input.text_preview: (b) When made (1) In general An election under subsection (a) may be made by a small business corporation for any taxable year— (A) at any time during the preceding taxable year, or (B) at any time during the taxable year and on or before the 15th day of the 3d month of the taxable year. (2) Certain elections made during 1st 2½ months treated as made for next taxable year If— (A) an election under subsection (a) is made for any taxable year during such year and on or before the 15th day of the 3...

output.raw_response:
```json
{
  "description": "S corporation election timing rules under IRC 1362(b)",
  "declarations": [
    "election_date: date",
    "target_year_start: date",
    "target_year_end: date",
    "preceding_year_start: date",
    "preceding_year_end: date",
    "following_year_start: date",
    "following_year_end: date",
    "deadline_target_year: date",
    "deadline_following_year: date",
    "short_year_deadline: date",
    "treated_as_following_year: bool",
    "requirements_met_before_election: bool",
    "all_shareholders_consented: bool",
    "is_short_taxable_year: bool",
    "reasonable_cause_found: bool",
    "treated_as_timely: bool"
  ],
  "constraints": [
    "target_year_end >= target_year_start",
    "target_year_end <= target_year_start + Period(1, 0, 0)",
    "preceding_year_end >= preceding_year_start",
    "preceding_year_end <= preceding_year_start + Period(1, 0, 0)",
    "following_year_end >= following_year_start",
    "following_year_end <= following_year_start + Period(1, 0, 0)",
    "preceding_year_end < target_year_start",
    "following_year_start > target_year_end",
    "deadline_target_year == target_year_start + Period(0, 2, 14)",
    "deadline_following_year == following_year_start + Period(0, 2, 14)",
    "short_year_deadline == target_year_start + Period(0, 2, 15)",
    "(is_short_taxable_year == True) -> (target_year_end <= target_year_start + Period(0, 2, 15))",
    "((election_date >= target_year_start) && (election_date <= deadline_target_year) && ((requirements_met_before_election == False) || (all_shareholders_consented == False))) -> (treated_as_following_year == True)",
    "((election_date > deadline_target_year) && (election_date <= deadline_following_year)) -> (treated_as_following_year == True)",
    "((is_short_taxable_year == True) && (election_date <= short_year_deadline)) -> (treated_as_timely == True)",
    "(reasonable_cause_found == True) -> (treated_as_timely == True)"
  ]
}
```

input.heading: Reserves for losses on loans of banks

input.heading: Other special rules
input.text_preview: (b) Certain property not eligible No credit shall be determined under this subpart with respect to— (1) Property used outside United States (A) In general Except as provided in subparagraph (B), no credit shall be determined under this subpart with respect to any property which is used predominantly outside the United States. (B) Exceptions Subparagraph (A) shall not apply to any property described in section 168(g)(4). (2) Property used for lodging No credit shall be determined under this subpa...

```json
{
  "description": "Property placed in service during taxable year, with short-term lease exception (less than 6 months)",
  "declarations": [
    "property_placed_in_service_date: date",
    "taxable_year_start: date",
    "taxable_year_end: date",
    "has_lease: bool",
    "lease_start: date",
    "lease_end: date",
    "is_short_term_lease: bool"
  ],

    "property_placed_in_service_date >= taxable_year_start && property_placed_in_service_date <= taxable_year_end",
    "taxable_year_end >= taxable_year_start",
    "taxable_year_end <= taxable_year_start + Period(1, 0, 0)",
    "(has_lease == True) -> (lease_end >= lease_start)",
    "(has_lease == True && is_short_term_lease == True) -> (lease_end < lease_start + Period(0, 6, 0))"
  ]
}
```
